case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS FIRST BAY CAPITAL CORP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,018.23 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST BAY CAPITAL CORP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST BAY CAPITAL CORP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIRST BAY CAPITAL CORP $1,018.23 PRINCIPAL, $16.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,034.52 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST BAY CAPITAL CORP
